content.json:
# Session Hijack Threat Dashboard
Monitors infostealer session hijacking indicators across interactive and non-interactive sign-in logs.

**Tables:** `SigninLogs`, `AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs` | **MITRE:** T1539 (Steal Web Session Cookie), T1550.001 (Application Access Token)

content.query:
union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend SignInType = iff(Type == "SigninLogs", "Interactive", "Non-Interactive")
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), SignInType
| render timechart
content.title: Sign-in Volume Timeline (Interactive vs Non-Interactive)

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend LocDetails = parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails))
| extend Country = tostring(LocDetails.countryOrRegion)
| extend City = tostring(LocDetails.city)
| extend Lat = toreal(LocDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude)
| extend Lon = toreal(LocDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude)
| where isnotempty(Lat) and isnotempty(Lon)
| summarize Events = count(), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by City, Country, Lat, Lon
| sort by Events desc
| take 50
content.title: Non-Interactive Sign-in Geography

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == "0"
| summarize
    DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    DistinctCountries = dcount(Location),
    TokenRefreshes = count(),
    DistinctApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10)
    by UserPrincipalName
| sort by DistinctIPs desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Users by IP Diversity (Non-Interactive)

content.query:
union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend SignInType = iff(Type == "SigninLogs", "Interactive", "Non-Interactive")
| summarize Count = count() by SignInType
| render piechart
content.title: Sign-in Type Breakdown

content.query:
union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend RiskLevel = coalesce(RiskLevelDuringSignIn, "none")
| where RiskLevel != "none"
| summarize Count = count() by RiskLevel
| sort by Count desc
| render barchart
content.title: Risk Level Distribution

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend OS = tostring(parse_json(DeviceDetail).operatingSystem)
| extend Browser = tostring(parse_json(DeviceDetail).browser)
| where isnotempty(OS) and isnotempty(Browser)
| extend Fingerprint = strcat(OS, " | ", Browser)
| summarize
    DistinctFingerprints = dcount(Fingerprint),
    Fingerprints = make_set(Fingerprint, 10),
    DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    Events = count()
    by UserPrincipalName
| where DistinctFingerprints >= 3
| sort by DistinctFingerprints desc
content.title: Device/Browser Anomaly Summary
